mapper.select:
SELECT so.id, so.order_sn, so.buyer_id, so.skill_id, so.staff_id, so.snapshot_title, so.snapshot_price, so.total_amount, so.order_status, so.pay_time, so.create_time, ss.title, ss.description, ss.price, ss.unit, ss.STATUS, si.NAME AS staffName, si.CODE AS staffCode, si.images AS staffImages, ui.NAME AS userName, ui.images AS userImages, ui.phone FROM skill_order so LEFT JOIN staff_skill ss ON (ss.) LEFT JOIN staff_info si ON (si.id = ss.staff_id) LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON (ui.id = so.user_id) WHERE 1 = 1
AND ss.title LIKE CONCAT('%',#{staffSkill.title},'%')
AND si.NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{staffSkill.staffName},'%')
AND ui.NAME LIKE CONCAT('%',#{staffSkill.userName},'%')
ORDER BY so.create_time DESC
